markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync on content production, workflow, and new initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/mvvy2SMbpsaQQrfLKAuttP6oMayz8M2v?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New CTAs for CRO:** GrowthX is drafting new, customizable CTAs to improve blog conversion. Panther's web agency (Pixel 1) is building the editable modules.](https://fathom.video/share/mvvy2SMbpsaQQrfLKAuttP6oMayz8M2v?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
  - [**Atlas Platform Demo:** GrowthX demoed its proprietary Atlas platform, explaining how it uses modular "artifacts" (e.g., personas, style guides) and a multi-agent pipeline to produce high-quality, fact-checked content.](https://fathom.video/share/mvvy2SMbpsaQQrfLKAuttP6oMayz8M2v?tab=summary&timestamp=723.0)
  - [**Content Workflow:** The team confirmed the weekly Airtable review process, noting live syncs are more efficient for feedback than async comments.](https://fathom.video/share/mvvy2SMbpsaQQrfLKAuttP6oMayz8M2v?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)
  - [**Publishing Blocked:** A site-wide navigation update has caused a week of deployment freezes, delaying the publication of 17 approved articles.](https://fathom.video/share/mvvy2SMbpsaQQrfLKAuttP6oMayz8M2v?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

## Topics

### Content Production & Workflow

  - [**Recent Deliverables:** 3 articles were delivered last week; Katie will complete a detailed review today.](https://fathom.video/share/mvvy2SMbpsaQQrfLKAuttP6oMayz8M2v?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
  - [**Strategy:** The content plan balances two goals:](https://fathom.video/share/mvvy2SMbpsaQQrfLKAuttP6oMayz8M2v?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
      - [**Authority Building:** Expert content to signal expertise to Google and LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/mvvy2SMbpsaQQrfLKAuttP6oMayz8M2v?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
      - [**Commercial Content:** Evaluation-stage pieces for lead generation.](https://fathom.video/share/mvvy2SMbpsaQQrfLKAuttP6oMayz8M2v?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
  - [**Workflow:** The weekly Airtable review process was confirmed.](https://fathom.video/share/mvvy2SMbpsaQQrfLKAuttP6oMayz8M2v?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)
      - [**Process:** Panther reviews topics, flagging for approval, changes, or rejection.](https://fathom.video/share/mvvy2SMbpsaQQrfLKAuttP6oMayz8M2v?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)
      - [**Efficiency:** Live syncs are more efficient for feedback than async Airtable comments.](https://fathom.video/share/mvvy2SMbpsaQQrfLKAuttP6oMayz8M2v?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)

### CRO & CTA Strategy

  - [**Goal:** Improve blog conversion rate (CRO) via new, targeted CTAs.](https://fathom.video/share/mvvy2SMbpsaQQrfLKAuttP6oMayz8M2v?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
  - [**Implementation:**](https://fathom.video/share/mvvy2SMbpsaQQrfLKAuttP6oMayz8M2v?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
      - [**GrowthX:** Drafting CTAs with specific value props for key products (e.g., Panther AI, Detection & Alerting).](https://fathom.video/share/mvvy2SMbpsaQQrfLKAuttP6oMayz8M2v?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
      - [**Panther:** Pixel 1 (web agency) is building the editable CTA modules (light/dark versions) for easy customization.](https://fathom.video/share/mvvy2SMbpsaQQrfLKAuttP6oMayz8M2v?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)
  - [**Status:** GrowthX will add CTAs for Security Data Lake and Hosting Options, then share the full list for feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/mvvy2SMbpsaQQrfLKAuttP6oMayz8M2v?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)

### Atlas Platform Demo

  - [Aida demoed Atlas, GrowthX's in-house content platform, to show how it ensures quality and accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/mvvy2SMbpsaQQrfLKAuttP6oMayz8M2v?tab=summary&timestamp=723.0)
  - [**Core Components:**](https://fathom.video/share/mvvy2SMbpsaQQrfLKAuttP6oMayz8M2v?tab=summary&timestamp=767.0)
      - [**Artifacts:** Modular context for the AI.](https://fathom.video/share/mvvy2SMbpsaQQrfLKAuttP6oMayz8M2v?tab=summary&timestamp=767.0)
          - [`Customer Spotlights`: Case studies with URLs, problems, and outcomes for proof points.](https://fathom.video/share/mvvy2SMbpsaQQrfLKAuttP6oMayz8M2v?tab=summary&timestamp=790.0)
          - [`Writing Guidelines`: Broken into specific artifacts (e.g., competitor content) to prevent overwhelming the AI with conflicting instructions.](https://fathom.video/share/mvvy2SMbpsaQQrfLKAuttP6oMayz8M2v?tab=summary&timestamp=832.0)
          - [`Proofreader Checklists`: AI-driven checks at the end of the pipeline to enforce style and fix errors.](https://fathom.video/share/mvvy2SMbpsaQQrfLKAuttP6oMayz8M2v?tab=summary&timestamp=887.0)
          - [`AI-isms Editor`: Guidelines to eliminate common AI phrases and ensure a human tone.](https://fathom.video/share/mvvy2SMbpsaQQrfLKAuttP6oMayz8M2v?tab=summary&timestamp=953.0)
      - [**Pipeline:** A multi-agent workflow for article creation.](https://fathom.video/share/mvvy2SMbpsaQQrfLKAuttP6oMayz8M2v?tab=summary&timestamp=1060.0)
          - [**Researcher (Tavilli/EXA):** Gathers in-depth info to prevent generic content.](https://fathom.video/share/mvvy2SMbpsaQQrfLKAuttP6oMayz8M2v?tab=summary&timestamp=1085.0)
          - [**Fact Checker:** Verifies each paragraph against sources; rewrites unconfirmed info.](https://fathom.video/share/mvvy2SMbpsaQQrfLKAuttP6oMayz8M2v?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
          - [**Human Editor:** Performs a final top-to-bottom review for flow, tone, and link accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/mvvy2SMbpsaQQrfLKAuttP6oMayz8M2v?tab=summary&timestamp=1244.0)
  - [**Feedback Loop:** Panther provides feedback (e.g., "no M-dashes") in article comments. GrowthX adds this to a Notion doc to update the relevant Atlas artifact, ensuring the change is applied to all future content.](https://fathom.video/share/mvvy2SMbpsaQQrfLKAuttP6oMayz8M2v?tab=summary&timestamp=1286.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Katie:** Complete detailed review of the 3 delivered articles.](https://fathom.video/share/mvvy2SMbpsaQQrfLKAuttP6oMayz8M2v?tab=summary&timestamp=1472.0)
  - [**Aida:**](https://fathom.video/share/mvvy2SMbpsaQQrfLKAuttP6oMayz8M2v?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
      - [Add CTAs for Security Data Lake and Hosting Options to the draft.](https://fathom.video/share/mvvy2SMbpsaQQrfLKAuttP6oMayz8M2v?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
      - [Share the complete CTA list with Panther for feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/mvvy2SMbpsaQQrfLKAuttP6oMayz8M2v?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
      - [Share links to the Notion strategy doc and other key resources.](https://fathom.video/share/mvvy2SMbpsaQQrfLKAuttP6oMayz8M2v?tab=summary&timestamp=1413.0)
  - [**GrowthX Team:** Deliver 5 new article drafts this week.](https://fathom.video/share/mvvy2SMbpsaQQrfLKAuttP6oMayz8M2v?tab=summary&timestamp=1491.0)
